name: Seafood Baked in a Package
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Swordfish OR halibut, cut into serving pieces 1/2-inch thick
3/4 lb Uncooked small or medium shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sprinkle fish with salt and pepper.
3. Mix butter, garlic, lemon juice, and tarragon until well blended.
4. Using half of the butter mixture, coat one side of the fish and place the buttered side down on a sheet of heavy-duty aluminum foil that measures 48 inches in length.
5. Place shrimp on top of the fish and dot with the remaining butter mixture.
6. Pour wine over the fish and fold the other half of the sheet foil over to seal and crimp.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes in the upper part of the oven.
8. Remove fish and shrimp, keeping them warm on a heated serving platter loosely covered with aluminum foil.
9. Pour off juices into a small skillet. Add cream and reduce to about 3/4 to 1 cup.
10. Pour over fish, sprinkle with parsley, and serve at once. Serves 6 to 8.
